data.name: The Frozen River: A GMA Book Club Pick
data.description: A gripping historical mystery inspired by the life and diary of Martha Ballard, a renowned 18th-century midwife who defied the legal system and wrote herself into American history. Set in Maine, 1789, the story follows Martha as she investigates a shocking murder and stands up for justice in a time when women were considered best seen and not heard.

response.name: The Frozen River: A GMA Book Club Pick
response.description: From the New York Times bestselling author of I Was Anastasia and Code Name Hélène comes a gripping historical mystery inspired by the life and diary of Martha Ballard, a renowned 18th-century midwife who defied the legal system and wrote herself into American history.
